content: *도구, 일반* {color="gray"} --- **무게:** 8 lbs **가치:** 20 GP --- **능력:** 근력 {color="red"} **활용:** 문이나 용기를 열기 (DC 20) {color="red"} **제작:** 모든 근거리 무기 ([곤봉](/212f7f5a1e80816db7aad12f932ac773?pvs=25), [대형 곤봉](/212f7f5a1e8081eebb90f0b0f3304dc6?pvs=25), [육척봉](/212f7f5a1e8081aa9c12cd3e70467b2b?pvs=25) 및 [채찍](/212f7f5a1e80812f909bff0e458cfd78?pvs=25) 제외), 평갑 (가죽 제외), 중갑, [쇠구슬](/212f7f5a1e808126889beeae773df1a4?pvs=25), [양동이](/212f7f5a1e8081bc9027eaa0e598ee45?pvs=25), [마름쇠](/212f7f5a1e808117ba68e08ab07d40c1?pvs=25), [사슬](/212f7f5a1e80814488e9e5b30e30b54e?pvs=25), [쇠지렛대](/212f7f5a1e808133bc17e3fe745b4ed7?pvs=25), [총탄](/1def7f5a1e8081e0894ae33ea0a6f908?pvs=25), [등반용 갈고리](/212f7f5a1e8081f5901af8bd766079e1?pvs=25), [철 냄비](/212f7f5a1e808131877ac2effe3c0f08?pvs=25), [쇠 말뚝](/212f7f5a1e8081f7ada8e85e477ba5e2?pvs=25), [무릿매 탄환](/1def7f5a1e8081e0894ae33ea0a6f908?pvs=25) {color="red"}
